title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.177 - Dangers of Inflation Awareness Day designated for April 15
text:
9.177.  Dangers of Inflation Awareness Day designated for April 15. — April fifteenth of every year is hereby designated as "Dangers of Inflation Awareness Day" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to be mindful of the dangers of monetary inflation and the detrimental effects of monetary inflation on our economy.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 § 11)
